title: Missing Session ID in Buffer Memory Node
symptom: After adding the window Buffer Memory module, the workflow throws 'No Session ID found'. This prevents the AI from maintaining context.
not_this_if: Using a different trigger that handles session IDs automatically
root_cause: The window Buffer Memory node requires a session ID to maintain context between messages. When using the Telegram Trigger, a session ID is not automatically set, leading to this error.
fix_steps: Open the settings for the window Buffer Memory node
Manually define a session ID (e.g., phone number or random UUID)
agent_instruction: Define a session ID in the window Buffer Memory node settings and save the workflow.
